# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] CI / release

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run --dev pytest -q` (from `wiimote-bridge/app`)
- [ ] Add-on builds locally or in CI
- [ ] Firmware flow validated if firmware-related

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated `wiimote-bridge/CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes
- [ ] I updated docs in `README.md` and/or `docs/` when behavior changed
- [ ] I updated translations in `wiimote-bridge/translations/` if config or UI text changed
- [ ] I kept security posture least-privilege (`privileged`, `capabilities`, API flags)

## Breaking changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change (describe below)

## Additional notes

Include migration steps, screenshots, logs, or follow-up work.
